tagline: Spare space on your trip—and a finder’s fee for what you want.

hero.eyebrow: Trip bag space · Finder’s fee asks
hero.body: In one marketplace you both list spare luggage room on journeys you already take and name a finder’s fee so someone nearby—or on the right route—can hunt down what you want and meet you to hand it off. Same city-first map, same clear profiles, same straight path to “deal.”

home.editorialTitle: Spare capacity and finder fees, in one place.
home.editorialBody: Eushop connects journeys with demand. Someone nearby may only need what you brought back in a tote; someone crossing time zones may sell the spare kilo in a checked bag. We focus on introductions, identity you can see, and chat that gets you to a clear next step.
home.pillar1Body: Discovery is built around cities, corridors, and handoff points—not only a country flag on a map.
home.pillar2Body: List spare luggage capacity on trips you already take, or post a request with a finder’s fee for something specific. Fixed prices land first; competitive bids follow on the roadmap where we can ship them cleanly.
home.pillar3Body: You agree terms in chat and settle in person or off-platform unless and until regulated in-app payments arrive. We never hold your money today.
home.ctaBandBody: Share what you brought, post a request, or get ready to publish trip capacity as those flows roll out—always within a 5 km cell of where you are so handoffs stay practical.

country.intro: Bring a taste of {country} to your doorstep.

empty.listings: No one's posted nearby — be the first to share your stash.
empty.requests: No open requests in your radius. Quiet for now.

mobile.onboardingSubtitle: The same story on web, admin, and here — tuned for thumbs.
mobile.onboardingDiscoverBody: Browse countries and listings in your radius — pins stay inside a 5 km cell.
mobile.onboardingShareBody: Post what you brought back from home. Set a small finder's fee and meet in public.
mobile.onboardingMeetBody: Message in-app, agree on a café or station, settle in person. We never touch the cash.
mobile.todaySubtitle: Real listings within a 5 km cell of where you are. Pull to refresh.
mobile.emptyHint: Be the first to share — or post a request and we'll ping you when a matching listing or trip offer lands.
